name: encoder_trend_plus_subject_position_core
description: Encoder event feature schema that keeps timing and transition dynamics plus subject-centered fixation position, while excluding raw screen-relative x/y coordinates.
notes: Use this schema to test whether removing absolute screen position while retaining within-subject relative fixation location improves generalization.
The subject-centered position columns should be generated with scripts/add_encoder_subject_centered_position_features.py.
Raw screen-relative x/y fixation coordinates are intentionally excluded.
No visual stimulus content is used.
